arguments.content:
# Progress Update

## Task Completed: Zustand Stores Implementation

### Files Created
- `apps/web/src/stores/patientStore.ts` - Patient management store
- `apps/web/src/stores/studyStore.ts` - Study management store
- `apps/web/src/stores/viewerStore.ts` - Viewer/viewport state store
- `apps/web/src/stores/reportStore.ts` - Report management store

### Store Features

#### patientStore.ts
- Patient list with pagination
- Patient CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
- Search functionality
- Filters (gender, tags, age range)
- Error handling

#### studyStore.ts
- Study list with pagination
- Study CRUD operations
- Study status management (pending → in_progress → diagnosed → reported)
- Series fetching for studies
- Filters (patientId, studyType, modality, status, date range)

#### viewerStore.ts
- Current image state
- Image stack navigation
- Viewport state (zoom, pan, rotation, flip, window/level, colormap)
- Tool management (20+ tools including pan, zoom, measurement, ROI, annotation)
- Annotation management with undo/redo history
- Layer management with visibility/opacity controls
- Comparison modes (single, sideBySide, overlay, slider)
- UI toggles (toolbar, info, minimap, fullscreen)

#### reportStore.ts
- Report list with pagination
- Report CRUD operations
- Report status management (draft → pending_review → reviewed → published)
- Template management
- Report version history
- Filters (patientId, studyId, status, templateId)
- Dirty state tracking for unsaved changes

### Validation
- TypeScript type checking passed with no errors in store files
- All stores use proper TypeScript types from @pacsviewer/shared
- All stores integrate with existing API services

### Notes
- Updated `apps/web/tsconfig.json` to include shared package types
- All stores follow Zustand best practices with proper state management
